creator: enami@ba2.so-net.or.jp
text:
pppd failes to set control terminal if -detach option is given.

Fix: I think there is no need to set control terminal if pppd doesn't
	detached.

*** main.c	1996/03/02 13:36:46	1.1
--- main.c	1996/03/02 13:37:20
***************
How-To-Repeat: 	Run pppd with -detach option.
